PLANNER / M1. WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA PLANNER
WHAT IS THE WEBINAR FUNNEL
FORMUL A AND HOW CAN I USE IT
MAXIMIZE WEBINAR PROFITABILITY?
Running a great webinar is just part of what you need to do to maximize your
profits. You need to optimize each step of your funnel so you can make the
extra sales. That’s what the Webinar Funnel Formula is all about.
A good webinar funnel can double to 5x the sales you’ll get from your
webinar (and not creating a solid webinar funnel can cost you half to 80% of
the sales you could have generated).
Plus, only 30% of people will even register for a webinar. So you need to
create a funnel to get the other 70% to buy your product… For those who
don’t register for your offer, run them through a funnel designed to sell them
your product. This funnel is very similar to the one you take those through
who register for your webinar but don’t buy.

PLANNER / M1. WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA PLANNER
WHAT ARE THE BEST OFFERS FOR
WEBINARS?
You can create a webinar to help sell almost anything. But there are certain
things that tend to work better than others.
Consider this question: Will you be using paid advertising to get people to
attend? If not, you can sell almost anything. If so, certain offers will be more
likely to be profitable.
Here are 8 common characteristics of offers that work on webinars:
✓ 	Higher-priced products (ideally $497 - $2500)
✓ 	Low-priced products so long as you have a list of potential buyers
✓ 	There is a real, unmet need
✓ 	People are willing to pay money to solve that need
✓ 	People are able to pay money to solve that need
✓ 	You can provide proof that your solution works
✓ 	The product sparks emotion
✓ 	You’re passionate about the product
✓ 	The product is differentiated in the marketplace
The best offers will show your audience the problems that their lack of a
solution creates, and the emotional impact of that problem, and can paint a
picture of their life with the problem solved (that they can aspire to achieve).

PLANNER / M1. WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA PLANNER
WHAT ARE THE KEY ELEMENTS FOR
WEBINAR SUCCESS?
Success with your webinar comes down to these elements:
✓ 	Passion
✓ 	Determination
✓ 	Focus
✓ 	A product
✓ 	An understanding of your audience’s needs
✓ 	A deadline (and a willingness to close your cart)
✓ 	An appealing offer
✓ 	Compelling proof
✓ 	A price point that makes it all worthwhile

PLANNER / M1. WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA PLANNER
WHAT ARE THE 6 DECISIONS YOU NEED
TO MAKE BEFORE CREATING YOUR
WEBINAR?
Each of the questions below is key to defining the nature of your webinar,
getting the right people to attend, and getting those who attend ready to buy
your product.
The problem with many webinars is that they don’t try to solve a specific
problem, or the problem they teach isn’t something people really want
solved, or they give tips, not solutions, or they don’t drill into how the problem
is affecting the avatar’s life before they solve it, or the solution isn’t believable.
Spend time answering the questions below and you can avoid these
problems.
See the 6 Key Decisions Before Your Webinar lesson for a more detailed
exercise.
1. What market are you targeting?
2. What are their biggest needs?
3. What transformation will you offer? What is your transformation
statement?
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	6 	9
transformation statement formula
what they’ll do so that…
[what the benefit will be to them]

4. What marketing hook (a short phrase designed to create interest in your
offering) will you use to attract them?
5. What will you present in the webinar (which of the 5 formats will you use)?
6. What tone will you use in your webinar?

PLANNER / M1. WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA PLANNER
WHAT IS THE BUYER’ S MINDSET ?
There are four aspects to the buyer’s mindset: What your prospect believes
about (1) the situation, (2) the product, (3) themselves and (4) you.
This exercise is about consciously moving your prospects into the right
mindset. When you’ve done this, it makes the sale that much easier.
As you begin to design your webinar, look at each segment through the lens
of your avatar/prospect and ask yourself if you’ve done all you can to move
prospects into the mindset they need to buy.
See The Buyer’s Mindset Exercise for a detailed exercise on this topic.

PLANNER / M1. WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA PLANNER
HOW LONG DOES IT TAKE TO CREATE A
GREAT WEBINAR?
You can create a good webinar in about 2 weeks of full-time work.
But to create a great webinar takes about a month including creating your
suite of assets which includes:
✓ 	Emails
✓ 	Webpages
✓ 	Sales pages
✓ 	Webinar registration gifts
✓ 	Ad Copy
These assets will be covered in more detail in subsequent modules.
